title: Gilbert Hernandez
content:
{{Top|rwp}} {{Person |image= |name=Gilbert Hernandez |birth=[[February 1]], [[1950s|1957]]
[[Wikipedia:Oxnard, California|Oxnard, California]] |death= |listedpronouns= |nationality=American |occupation=*Writer *Inker *Penciller |companies= |website= }} '''Gilberto Hernandez''', (born [[February 1]], [[1950s|1957]]), usually credited as '''Gilbert Hernandez''' and also known by the nickname '''Beto''', is an American comics creator, who wrote and pencilled the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] "[[Young Lando Calrissian]]." {{Bio-stub}} ==Sources== *{{Tales|20|Young Lando Calrissian}} ==External links== *{{WP|Gilbert Hernandez}} [[Category:Comic authors]] [[Category:Comic book pencillers]] [[Category:Comic book inkers]]
